data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 105,000 USDT with a 3.24% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jun 13, 2025, 17:48 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 105,000 USDT and is now trading at 104,908.460938 USDT, with a narrowed 3.24% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Breaking: Invesco Galaxy Registers Solana ETF Amid 90% Odds of Approval
data.description:
Invesco and Galaxy on Friday said it has officially registered for Solana ETF in Delaware. The move comes as the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) asked the issuers to file updated Form S-1, hinting at approval likely by the end of the year
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/13/breaking-invesco-galaxy-registers-solana-etf-amid-90-odds-of-approval/

data.title: Weeks Before Trial, Tornado Cash’s Roman Storm Sounds Alarm: ‘If I Lose, DeFi Dies With Me’
data.description:
The software developer is set to go to trial next month over his operation of the popular coin mixer, despite recent moves by the Trump DOJ to back off such services.
source: https://decrypt.co/325095/weeks-before-trial-tornado-cashs-roman-storm-sounds-alarm-if-i-lose-defi-dies-with-me

data.title: ADA Drops 6% as Cardano Community Debates $100M Stablecoin Liquidity Proposal
data.description:
Cardano’s ADA token declined 6.01% to $0.6412 as the market reacted to both macro volatility and a heated governance debate over a proposed $100 million treasury allocation aimed at strengthening the DeFi ecosystem. On Wednesday, the TapTools team asked its followers on X what they think about the idea of deploying 140 million ADA (around $100 million) to provide liquidity for stablecoins like USDM and help power Cardano’s growing decentralized finance sector
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/06/13/ada-drops-6-as-cardano-community-debates-usd100m-stablecoin-liquidity-proposal

data.title: Closing Strait of Hormuz is biggest risk to BTC price this weekend — Analyst
data.description:
Risk assets would take a significant hit if Iran closes the Strait of Hormuz, a narrow waterway supplying 20% of the global oil trade.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/closing-strait-hormuz-biggest-risk-btc-price-weekend?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: SEC Names Crypto Industry Veteran as Trading and Markets Director
data.description:
The SEC has named Jamie Selway, who has experience in the crypto industry, as its new director of the trading and markets division.
source: https://decrypt.co/325083/sec-names-crypto-industry-veteran-trading-markets-director

data.title: Trump Calls Fed Chair Jerome Powell a ‘Numbskull,’ Claims Lack of Rate Cuts Are Costing US $600,000,000,000 a Year
data.description:
US President Donald Trump has more insults for Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. At a bill signing ceremony on Thursday, Trump claimed the government would save $600 billion a year in short-term debt payments if Powell lowered the federal funds rate by 2 percentage points.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/13/trump-calls-fed-chair-jerome-powell-a-numbskull-claims-lack-of-rate-cuts-are-costing-us-600000000000-a-year/

data.title: BlockDAG Presale Nears $300M Milestone, While Tron Forecasts Flash Optimism & Kaspa Locks Up Supply
data.description:
Three developments are drawing significant attention in the cryptocurrency market right now. The latest Tron (TRX) price forecast suggests potential upside as technical indicators strengthen, even though underlying network data remains mixed. At the same time, the Kaspa (KAS) market outlook is growing more bullish as long-term holders dominate the token supply and reduce circulation. . . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/blockdag-presale-nears-300m-milestone-while-tron-forecasts-flash-optimism-kaspa-locks-up-supply/

data.title: Bitcoin Price Crash To $94,000 Imminent As Fibonacci Resistance Is At Stake
data.description:
Bitcoin’s recent price action has shown signs of fading momentum three weeks after reaching a new all-time high of $111,814. The leading cryptocurrency climbed back above $110,000 on Monday off the back of cooling U. S. inflation data and a temporarily weaker dollar
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-crash-to-94000-imminent/

data.title: Polkadot seeks stability with $2M Bitcoin reserve strategy amid DOT downturn
data.description:
A new proposal within the Polkadot ecosystem is pushing for the creation of a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. According to the proposal, the plan involves converting 500,000 DOT, valued at around $2 million, into Threshold Bitcoin (tBTC), a wrapped version of Bitcoin secured through threshold cryptography, which ensures decentralization and non-custodial management.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/polkadot-seeks-stability-with-2m-bitcoin-reserve-strategy-amid-dot-downturn/

data.title: Will PEPE Coin Price See Breakout To $0.0003 Amid Volatile Activity?
data.description:
Pepe coin (PEPE) has been on the investors’ radar amid its volatile price movements and increased market activity. As the meme coin price hovers around $0. 00001223, market participants closely watched to see if PEPE will break out and potentially reach $0. 0003
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/13/will-pepe-coin-price-see-breakout-to-0-0003-amid-volatile-activity/

data.title: Andrew Kang: Bitcoin is unlikely to see a 30% correction in the short term, and may fluctuate upward to $140,000-160,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Andrew Kang, partner of Mechanism Capital, said in an article that the current market environment is extremely favorable for Bitcoin, and Bitcoin is expected to continue to rise amid volatility. Before it reaches at least $140,000 to $160,000, the possibility of a deep correction of more than 30% is low. He also mentioned that the policies adopted by Trump during the trade war had become a key bottom signal for Bitcoin.

data.title: Israel Confirms Missile Launch from Yemen
data.description: According to Odaily, the Israeli military has confirmed that a missile was launched from Yemen and is heading towards Israel. Efforts are currently underway to intercept the missile.

data.title: Bloomberg lists spot ETF decisions and their 2025 approval odds
data.description:
The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) will decide on crypto exchange-traded funds (spot ETFs) approvals in the second half of 2025. A Bloomberg snapshot shared by ETF analyst Eric Balchunas shows a list of digital asset funds filed and odds of approval, led by Grayscale, VanEck, Bitwise, and Canary Capital. The tokens include Solana […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bloomberg-spot-etf-2025-approval-odds/
